description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian:latest Docker image and runs apt update, apt install luarocks -y, and luarocks install moonscript in a global before_script. Define a single stage named build and add a ppm2 job that always runs (when: always). In the ppm2 job execute the shell commands rm -rf ./lua, mkdir lua, and sh build.sh. Publish the contents of the lua/* directory as an artifact named $CI_JOB_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_SHA.
